tEn: Mastering Atari, Go, Chess and Shogi by Planning with a Learned Model
tZh: 通过规划掌握雅达利、围棋、国际象棋和将棋：基于学习模型的方法
sEn: MuZero achieves superhuman performance in Atari, Go, chess, and shogi by combining tree-based search with a learned model, without knowing the environment dynamics.
sZh: MuZero算法通过将基于树的搜索与学习模型相结合，在不了解环境动态的情况下，在雅达利、围棋、国际象棋和将棋中实现了超人类表现。
absEn: Constructing agents with planning capabilities has long been one of the main challenges in the pursuit of artificial intelligence. Tree-based planning methods have enjoyed huge success in challenging domains, such as chess and Go, where a perfect simulator is available. However, in real-world problems the dynamics governing the environment are often complex and unknown. In this work we present the MuZero algorithm which, by combining a tree-based search with a learned model, achieves superhuman performance in a range of challenging and visually complex domains, without any knowledge of their underlying dynamics. MuZero learns a model that, when applied iteratively, predicts the quantities most directly relevant to planning: the reward, the action-selection policy, and the value function. When evaluated on 57 different Atari games - the canonical video game environment for testing AI techniques, in which model-based planning approaches have historically struggled - our new algorithm achieved a new state of the art. When evaluated on Go, chess and shogi, without any knowledge of the game rules, MuZero matched the superhuman performance of the AlphaZero algorithm that was supplied with the game rules.
absZh: 构建具有规划能力的智能体一直是人工智能追求的主要挑战之一。基于树的规划方法在象棋和围棋等拥有完美模拟器的挑战性领域取得了巨大成功。然而，在现实问题中，环境动态往往复杂且未知。本文提出了MuZero算法，它通过将基于树的搜索与学习模型相结合，在一系列具有挑战性和视觉复杂性的领域中实现了超人类表现，而无需了解其底层动态。MuZero学习一个模型，该模型在迭代应用时预测与规划最直接相关的量：奖励、动作选择策略和值函数。在57个不同的雅达利游戏（测试AI技术的经典视频游戏环境，历史上基于模型的规划方法在此处表现不佳）上评估时，我们的新算法达到了新的最优水平。在围棋、国际象棋和将棋上评估时，无需任何游戏规则知识，MuZero就达到了与提供游戏规则的AlphaZero算法相同的超人类表现。

contrib.en: Proposes MuZero, combining tree-based search with a learned model for planning without environment dynamics.
contrib.zh: 提出MuZero算法，将基于树的搜索与学习模型结合，无需环境动态知识即可规划。

contrib.en: Achieves superhuman performance in Go, chess, shogi, and state-of-the-art on 57 Atari games.
contrib.zh: 在围棋、国际象棋、将棋中达到超人类水平，并在57款Atari游戏中取得最优结果。

contrib.en: Learns a model predicting reward, policy, and value function directly relevant to planning.
contrib.zh: 学习直接预测与规划相关的奖励、策略和价值函数的模型。

contrib.en: Introduces value-equivalent model learning without reconstructing observations or true state.
contrib.zh: 引入价值等价模型学习，无需重建观测或真实状态。

contrib.en: Demonstrates scalability of planning with learned model matching perfect model in Go.
contrib.zh: 证明学习模型在围棋中规划的可扩展性，与完美模型性能匹配。

contrib.en: Shows search-based policy improvement provides stronger learning signal than model-free Q-learning.
contrib.zh: 表明基于搜索的策略改进比无模型Q-learning提供更强的学习信号。

limits.en: Model is deterministic; extension to stochastic transitions left for future work.
limits.zh: 模型为确定性，随机转换扩展留待未来工作。

limits.en: Performance in Atari plateaus with search simulations, suggesting model inaccuracy.
limits.zh: Atari中性能随搜索模拟趋于平稳，表明模型不准确性。

limits.en: Requires significant compute for training (1 million mini-batches, 800 simulations in board games).
limits.zh: 训练需要大量算力（100万小批量，棋盘游戏800次模拟）。

limits.en: Not directly applicable to imperfect information games like Poker.
limits.zh: 不直接适用于不完全信息游戏如扑克。

limits.en: Limited to environments with discrete actions and rewards; continuous domains not addressed.
limits.zh: 限于离散动作和奖励环境，未涉及连续域。

items.en: Constructing agents with planning capabilities has long been one of the main challenges in the pursuit of artificial intelligence. Tree-based planning methods have enjoyed huge success in challenging domains, such as chess and Go, where a perfect simulator is available. However, in real-world problems the dynamics governing the environment are often complex and unknown. In this work we present the MuZero algorithm which, by combining a tree-based search with a learned model, achieves superhuman performance in a range of challenging and visually complex domains, without any knowledge of their underlying dynamics. MuZero learns a model that, when applied iteratively, predicts the quantities most directly relevant to planning: the reward, the action-selection policy, and the value function. When evaluated on 57 different Atari games - the canonical video game environment for testing AI techniques, in which model-based planning approaches have historically struggled - our new algorithm achieved a new state of the art. When evaluated on Go, chess and shogi, without any knowledge of the game rules, MuZero matched the superhuman performance of the AlphaZero algorithm that was supplied with the game rules.
items.zh: 构建具有规划能力的智能体一直是人工智能追求的主要挑战之一。基于树的规划方法在象棋和围棋等具有完美模拟器的挑战性领域取得了巨大成功。然而，在现实问题中，环境动态通常复杂且未知。本文提出MuZero算法，通过将基于树的搜索与学习模型相结合，在多个具有挑战性且视觉复杂的领域中实现了超人类表现，且无需任何底层动态知识。MuZero学习一个模型，该模型在迭代应用时预测与规划最直接相关的量：奖励、动作选择策略和价值函数。在57种不同的Atari游戏（测试AI技术的经典视频游戏环境，基于模型的规划方法历来难以应对）上评估时，我们的新算法达到了新的最优水平。在围棋、国际象棋和将棋上评估时，无需任何游戏规则知识，MuZero达到了AlphaZero算法（已知游戏规则）的超人类表现。

items.en: Planning algorithms based on lookahead search have achieved remarkable successes in artificial intelligence. Human world champions have been defeated in classic games such as checkers [34], chess [5], Go [38] and poker [3, 26], and planning algorithms have had real-world impact in applications from logistics [47] to chemical synthesis [37]. However, these planning algorithms all rely on knowledge of the environment’s dynamics, such as the rules of the game or an accurate simulator, preventing their direct application to real-world domains like robotics, industrial control, or intelligent assistants.
items.zh: 基于前瞻搜索的规划算法在人工智能领域取得了显著成功。人类世界冠军在跳棋[34]、国际象棋[5]、围棋[38]和扑克[3, 26]等经典游戏中已被击败，规划算法在物流[47]到化学合成[37]等应用中产生了实际影响。然而，这些规划算法都依赖于环境动态知识，如游戏规则或精确模拟器，这阻碍了它们直接应用于机器人、工业控制或智能助手等现实领域。

items.en: Model-based reinforcement learning (RL) [42] aims to address this issue by first learning a model of the environment’s dynamics, and then planning with respect to the learned model. Typically, these models have either focused on reconstructing the true environmental state [8, 16, 24], or the sequence of full observations [14, 20]. However, prior work [4, 14, 20] remains far from the state of the art in visually rich domains, such as Atari 2600 games [2]. Instead, the most successful methods are based on model-free RL [9, 21, 18] – i.e. they estimate the optimal policy and/or value function directly from interactions with the environment. However, model-free algorithms are in turn far from the state of the art in domains that require precise and sophisticated lookahead, such as chess and Go.
items.zh: 基于模型的强化学习（RL）[42]旨在通过先学习环境动态模型，然后基于学习模型进行规划来解决这一问题。通常，这些模型要么专注于重建真实环境状态[8, 16, 24]，要么专注于完整观测序列[14, 20]。然而，先前的工作[4, 14, 20]在视觉丰富领域（如Atari 2600游戏[2]）中远未达到最优水平。相反，最成功的方法基于无模型RL [9, 21, 18]——即直接从与环境交互中估计最优策略和/或价值函数。然而，无模型算法在需要精确复杂前瞻的领域（如国际象棋和围棋）中又远未达到最优水平。

items.en: In this paper, we introduce MuZero, a new approach to model-based RL that achieves state-of-the-art performance in Atari 2600, a visually complex set of domains, while maintaining superhuman performance in precision planning tasks such as chess, shogi and Go. MuZero builds upon AlphaZero’s [39] powerful search and search-based policy iteration algorithms, but incorporates a learned model into the training procedure. MuZero also extends AlphaZero to a broader set of environments including single agent domains and non-zero rewards at intermediate time-steps.
items.zh: 本文介绍MuZero，一种新的基于模型的RL方法，在视觉复杂的Atari 2600领域实现了最优性能，同时在国际象棋、将棋和围棋等精确规划任务中保持超人类表现。MuZero建立在AlphaZero [39]强大的搜索和基于搜索的策略迭代算法之上，但将学习模型融入训练过程。MuZero还将AlphaZero扩展到更广泛的环境，包括单智能体领域和中间时间步非零奖励。

items.en: The main idea of the algorithm (summarized in Figure 1) is to predict those aspects of the future that are directly relevant for planning. The model receives the observation (e.g. an image of the Go board or the Atari screen) as an input and transforms it into a hidden state. The hidden state is then updated iteratively by a recurrent process that receives the previous hidden state and a hypothetical next action. At every one of these steps the model predicts the policy (e.g. the move to play), value function (e.g. the predicted winner), and immediate reward (e.g. the points scored by playing a move). The model is trained end-to-end, with the sole objective of accurately estimating these three important quantities, so as to match the improved estimates of policy and value generated by search as well as the observed reward. There is no direct constraint or requirement for the hidden state to capture all information necessary to reconstruct the original observation, drastically reducing the amount of information the model has to maintain and predict; nor is there any requirement for the hidden state to match the unknown, true state of the environment; nor any other constraints on the semantics of state. Instead, the hidden states are free to represent state in whatever way is relevant to predicting current and future values and policies. Intuitively, the agent can invent, internally, the rules or dynamics that lead to most accurate planning.
items.zh: 算法的主要思想（总结于图1）是预测与规划直接相关的未来方面。模型接收观测（例如围棋棋盘或Atari屏幕的图像）作为输入，并将其转换为隐藏状态。然后，通过一个循环过程迭代更新隐藏状态，该过程接收前一个隐藏状态和假设的下一个动作。在这些步骤的每一步，模型预测策略（例如要走的棋步）、价值函数（例如预测的赢家）和即时奖励（例如走一步获得的分数）。模型以端到端方式训练，唯一目标是准确估计这三个重要量，以匹配搜索生成的策略和价值改进估计以及观测到的奖励。没有直接约束或要求隐藏状态捕获重建原始观测所需的所有信息，这大大减少了模型必须维护和预测的信息量；也没有要求隐藏状态匹配未知的真实环境状态；也没有对状态语义的其他约束。相反，隐藏状态可以自由地以任何与预测当前和未来价值及策略相关的方式表示状态。直观地说，智能体可以在内部发明导致最准确规划的规则或动态。

items.en: Reinforcement learning may be subdivided into two principal categories: model-based, and model-free [42]. Model-based RL constructs, as an intermediate step, a model of the environment. Classically, this model is represented by a Markov-decision process (MDP) [31] consisting of two components: a state transition model, predicting the next state, and a reward model, predicting the expected reward during that transition. The model is typically conditioned on the selected action, or a temporally abstract behavior such as an option [43]. Once a model has been constructed, it is straightforward to apply MDP planning algorithms, such as value iteration [31] or Monte-Carlo tree search (MCTS) [7], to compute the optimal value or optimal policy for the MDP. In large or partially observed environments, the algorithm must first construct the state representation that the model should predict. This tripartite separation between representation learning, model learning, and planning is potentially problematic since the agent is not able to optimize its representation or model for the purpose of effective planning, so that, for example modeling errors may compound during planning.
items.zh: 强化学习可分为两个主要类别：基于模型和无模型[42]。基于模型的RL作为中间步骤构建环境模型。经典地，该模型由马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）[31]表示，包含两个组件：状态转移模型（预测下一状态）和奖励模型（预测转移期间的期望奖励）。模型通常以所选动作或时间抽象行为（如选项[43]）为条件。一旦构建了模型，就可以直接应用MDP规划算法，如值迭代[31]或蒙特卡洛树搜索（MCTS）[7]，来计算MDP的最优价值或最优策略。在大规模或部分观测环境中，算法必须首先构建模型应预测的状态表示。表示学习、模型学习和规划之间的这种三方分离可能存在问题，因为智能体无法为有效规划优化其表示或模型，例如，建模误差可能在规划期间累积。

items.en: A common approach to model-based RL focuses on directly modeling the observation stream at the pixel-level. It has been hypothesized that deep, stochastic models may mitigate the problems of compounding error [14, 20]. However, planning at pixel-level granularity is not computationally tractable in large scale problems. Other methods build a latent state-space model that is sufficient to reconstruct the observation stream at pixel level [48, 49], or to predict its future latent states [13, 11], which facilitates more efficient planning but still focuses the majority of the model capacity on potentially irrelevant detail. None of these prior methods has constructed a model that facilitates effective planning in visually complex domains such as Atari; results lag behind well-tuned, model-free methods, even in terms of data efficiency [45].
items.zh: 一种常见的基于模型RL方法专注于在像素级别直接建模观测流。有人假设深度随机模型可能减轻累积误差问题[14, 20]。然而，在像素级别进行规划在大规模问题中计算上不可行。其他方法构建一个潜在状态空间模型，该模型足以在像素级别重建观测流[48, 49]，或预测其未来潜在状态[13, 11]，这促进了更高效的规划，但仍将大部分模型容量集中在可能不相关的细节上。这些先前方法都没有构建一个能在视觉复杂领域（如Atari）中促进有效规划的模型；即使在数据效率方面，结果也落后于精心调整的无模型方法[45]。

items.en: A quite different approach to model-based RL has recently been developed, focused end-to-end on predicting the value function [41]. The main idea of these methods is to construct an abstract MDP model such that planning in the abstract MDP is equivalent to planning in the real environment. This equivalence is achieved by ensuring value equivalence, i.e. that, starting from the same real state, the cumulative reward of a trajectory through the abstract MDP matches the cumulative reward of a trajectory in the real environment.
items.zh: 最近发展了一种完全不同的基于模型RL方法，专注于端到端预测价值函数[41]。这些方法的主要思想是构建一个抽象MDP模型，使得在抽象MDP中的规划等价于在真实环境中的规划。这种等价性通过确保价值等价来实现，即从相同真实状态开始，通过抽象MDP的轨迹的累积奖励与真实环境中轨迹的累积奖励匹配。

items.en: The predictron [41] first introduced value equivalent models for predicting value (without actions). Although the underlying model still takes the form of an MDP, there is no requirement for its transition model to match real states in the environment. Instead the MDP model is viewed as a hidden layer of a deep neural network. The unrolled MDP is trained such that the expected cumulative sum of rewards matches the expected value with respect to the real environment, e.g. by temporal-difference learning.
items.zh: Predictron [41]首次引入了用于预测价值（无动作）的价值等价模型。尽管底层模型仍采用MDP形式，但其转移模型无需匹配环境中的真实状态。相反，MDP模型被视为深度神经网络的隐藏层。展开的MDP经过训练，使得期望累积奖励之和匹配相对于真实环境的期望价值，例如通过时间差分学习。

items.en: Value equivalent models were subsequently extended to optimising value (with actions). TreeQN [10] learns an abstract MDP model, such that a tree search over that model (represented by a tree-structured neural network) approximates the optimal value function. Value iteration networks [44] learn a local MDP model, such that value iteration over that model (represented by a convolutional neural network) approximates the optimal value function. Value prediction networks [28] are perhaps the closest precursor to MuZero: they learn an MDP model grounded in real actions; the unrolled MDP is trained such that the cumulative sum of rewards, conditioned on the actual sequence of actions generated by a simple lookahead search, matches the real environment. Unlike MuZero there is no policy prediction, and the search only utilizes value prediction.
items.zh: 价值等价模型随后被扩展到优化价值（有动作）。TreeQN [10]学习一个抽象MDP模型，使得对该模型的树搜索（由树结构神经网络表示）近似最优价值函数。值迭代网络[44]学习一个局部MDP模型，使得对该模型的值迭代（由卷积神经网络表示）近似最优价值函数。价值预测网络[28]可能是MuZero最接近的前身：它们学习一个基于真实动作的MDP模型；展开的MDP经过训练，使得累积奖励之和（以简单前瞻搜索生成的实际动作序列为条件）匹配真实环境。与MuZero不同，没有策略预测，搜索仅利用价值预测。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Planning, acting, and training with a learned model. (A) How MuZero uses its model to plan. The model consists of three connected components for representation, dynamics and prediction. Given a previous hidden state sk−1superscript𝑠𝑘1s^{k-1} and a candidate action aksuperscript𝑎𝑘a^{k}, the dynamics function g𝑔g produces an immediate reward rksuperscript𝑟𝑘r^{k} and a new hidden state sksuperscript𝑠𝑘s^{k}. The policy pksuperscript𝑝𝑘p^{k} and value function vksuperscript𝑣𝑘v^{k} are computed from the hidden state sksuperscript𝑠𝑘s^{k} by a prediction function f𝑓f. The initial hidden state s0superscript𝑠0s^{0} is obtained by passing the past observations (e.g. the Go board or Atari screen) into a representation function hℎh. (B) How MuZero acts in the environment. A Monte-Carlo Tree Search is performed at each timestep t𝑡t, as described in A. An action at+1subscript𝑎𝑡1a_{t+1} is sampled from the search policy πtsubscript𝜋𝑡\pi_{t}, which is proportional to the visit count for each action from the root node. The environment receives the action and generates a new observation ot+1subscript𝑜𝑡1o_{t+1} and reward ut+1subscript𝑢𝑡1u_{t+1}. At the end of the episode the trajectory data is stored into a replay buffer. (C) How MuZero trains its model. A trajectory is sampled from the replay buffer. For the initial step, the representation function hℎh receives as input the past observations o1,…,otsubscript𝑜1…subscript𝑜𝑡o_{1},...,o_{t} from the selected trajectory. The model is subsequently unrolled recurrently for K𝐾K steps. At each step k𝑘k, the dynamics function g𝑔g receives as input the hidden state sk−1superscript𝑠𝑘1s^{k-1} from the previous step and the real action at+ksubscript𝑎𝑡𝑘a_{t+k}. The parameters of the representation, dynamics and prediction functions are jointly trained, end-to-end by backpropagation-through-time, to predict three quantities: the policy 𝐩k≈πt+ksuperscript𝐩𝑘subscript𝜋𝑡𝑘\mathbf{p}^{k}\approx\pi_{t+k}, value function vk≈zt+ksuperscript𝑣𝑘subscript𝑧𝑡𝑘v^{k}\approx z_{t+k}, and reward rt+k≈ut+ksubscript𝑟𝑡𝑘subscript𝑢𝑡𝑘r_{t+k}\approx u_{t+k}, where zt+ksubscript𝑧𝑡𝑘z_{t+k} is a sample return: either the final reward (board games) or n𝑛n-step return (Atari).
items.capZh: 图1：使用学习模型进行规划、行动和训练。(A) MuZero如何使用其模型进行规划。模型由三个连接组件组成：表示函数、动态函数和预测函数。给定前一个隐藏状态s^{k-1}和候选动作a^k，动态函数g产生即时奖励r^k和新的隐藏状态s^k。策略p^k和价值函数v^k由预测函数f从隐藏状态s^k计算得出。初始隐藏状态s^0通过将过去观测（例如围棋棋盘或Atari屏幕）传入表示函数h获得。(B) MuZero如何在环境中行动。在每个时间步t执行蒙特卡洛树搜索，如A所述。从搜索策略π_t中采样动作a_{t+1}，该策略与根节点每个动作的访问次数成正比。环境接收动作并生成新的观测o_{t+1}和奖励u_{t+1}。在回合结束时，轨迹数据存储到回放缓冲区中。(C) MuZero如何训练其模型。从回放缓冲区中采样轨迹。对于初始步骤，表示函数h接收所选轨迹的过去观测o_1,...,o_t作为输入。随后模型循环展开K步。在每一步k，动态函数g接收前一步的隐藏状态s^{k-1}和真实动作a_{t+k}作为输入。表示函数、动态函数和预测函数的参数通过时间反向传播以端到端方式联合训练，以预测三个量：策略p^k ≈ π_{t+k}、价值函数v^k ≈ z_{t+k}和奖励r_{t+k} ≈ u_{t+k}，其中z_{t+k}是样本回报：最终奖励（棋盘游戏）或n步回报（Atari）。

items.en: We now describe the MuZero algorithm in more detail. Predictions are made at each time-step t𝑡t, for each of k=1​…​K𝑘1…𝐾k=1...K steps, by a model μθsubscript𝜇𝜃\mu_{\theta}, with parameters θ𝜃\theta, conditioned on past observations o1,…,otsubscript𝑜1…subscript𝑜𝑡o_{1},...,o_{t} and future actions at+1,…,at+ksubscript𝑎𝑡1…subscript𝑎𝑡𝑘a_{t+1},...,a_{t+k}. The model predicts three future quantities: the policy 𝐩tk≈π​(at+k+1|o1,…,ot,at+1,…,at+k)subscriptsuperscript𝐩𝑘𝑡𝜋conditionalsubscript𝑎𝑡𝑘1subscript𝑜1…subscript𝑜𝑡subscript𝑎𝑡1…subscript𝑎𝑡𝑘\mathbf{p}^{k}_{t}\approx\pi(a_{t+k+1}|o_{1},...,o_{t},a_{t+1},...,a_{t+k}), the value function vtk≈𝔼​[ut+k+1+γ​ut+k+2+…|o1,…,ot,at+1,…,at+k]subscriptsuperscript𝑣𝑘𝑡𝔼delimited-[]subscript𝑢𝑡𝑘1𝛾subscript𝑢𝑡𝑘2conditional…subscript𝑜1…subscript𝑜𝑡subscript𝑎𝑡1…subscript𝑎𝑡𝑘v^{k}_{t}\approx\mathbb{E}\left[{u_{t+k+1}+\gamma u_{t+k+2}+...|o_{1},...,o_{t},a_{t+1},...,a_{t+k}}\right], and the immediate reward rtk≈ut+ksubscriptsuperscript𝑟𝑘𝑡subscript𝑢𝑡𝑘r^{k}_{t}\approx u_{t+k}, where u.subscript𝑢.u_{.} is the true, observed reward, π𝜋\pi is the policy used to select real actions, and γ𝛾\gamma is the discount function of the environment.
items.zh: 我们现在更详细地描述MuZero算法。在每个时间步t，对于k=1...K步，由参数为θ的模型μ_θ进行预测，该模型以过去观测o_1,...,o_t和未来动作a_{t+1},...,a_{t+k}为条件。模型预测三个未来量：策略p^k_t ≈ π(a_{t+k+1}|o_1,...,o_t,a_{t+1},...,a_{t+k})、价值函数v^k_t ≈ E[u_{t+k+1}+γu_{t+k+2}+...|o_1,...,o_t,a_{t+1},...,a_{t+k}]和即时奖励r^k_t ≈ u_{t+k}，其中u_.是真实观测奖励，π是用于选择真实动作的策略，γ是环境的折扣函数。

items.en: Internally, at each time-step t𝑡t (subscripts t suppressed for simplicity), the model is represented by the combination of a representation function, a dynamics function, and a prediction function. The dynamics function, rk,sk=gθ​(sk−1,ak)superscript𝑟𝑘superscript𝑠𝑘subscript𝑔𝜃superscript𝑠𝑘1superscript𝑎𝑘r^{k},s^{k}=g_{\theta}(s^{k-1},a^{k}), is a recurrent process that computes, at each hypothetical step k𝑘k, an immediate reward rksuperscript𝑟𝑘r^{k} and an internal state sksuperscript𝑠𝑘s^{k}. It mirrors the structure of an MDP model that computes the expected reward and state transition for a given state and action [31]. However, unlike traditional approaches to model-based RL [42], this internal state sksuperscript𝑠𝑘s^{k} has no semantics of environment state attached to it – it is simply the hidden state of the overall model, and its sole purpose is to accurately predict relevant, future quantities: policies, values, and rewards. In this paper, the dynamics function is represented deterministically; the extension to stochastic transitions is left for future work. The policy and value functions are computed from the internal state sksuperscript𝑠𝑘s^{k} by the prediction function, 𝐩k,vk=fθ​(sk)superscript𝐩𝑘superscript𝑣𝑘subscript𝑓𝜃superscript𝑠𝑘\mathbf{p}^{k},v^{k}=f_{\theta}(s^{k}), akin to the joint policy and value network of AlphaZero. The “root” state s0superscript𝑠0s^{0} is initialized using a representation function that encodes past observations, s0=hθ​(o1,…,ot)superscript𝑠0subscriptℎ𝜃subscript𝑜1…subscript𝑜𝑡s^{0}=h_{\theta}(o_{1},...,o_{t}); again this has no special semantics beyond its support for future predictions.
items.zh: 在内部，每个时间步t（下标t为简洁起见省略），模型由表示函数、动态函数和预测函数的组合表示。动态函数r^k,s^k = g_θ(s^{k-1},a^k)是一个循环过程，在每个假设步骤k计算即时奖励r^k和内部状态s^k。它反映了MDP模型的结构，该模型计算给定状态和动作的期望奖励和状态转移[31]。然而，与传统的基于模型RL方法[42]不同，该内部状态s^k没有附加环境状态的语义——它只是整个模型的隐藏状态，其唯一目的是准确预测相关的未来量：策略、价值和奖励。在本文中，动态函数被确定性地表示；扩展到随机转移留待未来工作。策略和价值函数由预测函数从内部状态s^k计算得出：p^k,v^k = f_θ(s^k)，类似于AlphaZero的联合策略和价值网络。“根”状态s^0使用编码过去观测的表示函数初始化：s^0 = h_θ(o_1,...,o_t)；同样，除了支持未来预测外，它没有特殊语义。

items.en: Given such a model, it is possible to search over hypothetical future trajectories a1,…,aksuperscript𝑎1…superscript𝑎𝑘a^{1},...,a^{k} given past observations o1,…,otsubscript𝑜1…subscript𝑜𝑡o_{1},...,o_{t}. For example, a naive search could simply select the k𝑘k step action sequence that maximizes the value function. More generally, we may apply any MDP planning algorithm to the internal rewards and state space induced by the dynamics function. Specifically, we use an MCTS algorithm similar to AlphaZero’s search, generalized to allow for single agent domains and intermediate rewards (see Methods). At each internal node, it makes use of the policy, value and reward estimates produced by the current model parameters θ𝜃\theta. The MCTS algorithm outputs a recommended policy πtsubscript𝜋𝑡\pi_{t} and estimated value νtsubscript𝜈𝑡\nu_{t}. An action at+1∼πtsimilar-tosubscript𝑎𝑡1subscript𝜋𝑡a_{t+1}\sim\pi_{t} is then selected.
items.zh: 给定这样的模型，可以在给定过去观测o_1,...,o_t的情况下搜索假设的未来轨迹a^1,...,a^k。例如，朴素搜索可以直接选择最大化价值函数的k步动作序列。更一般地，我们可以将任何MDP规划算法应用于动态函数产生的内部奖励和状态空间。具体来说，我们使用类似于AlphaZero搜索的MCTS算法，但推广到允许单智能体领域和中间奖励（见方法）。在每个内部节点，它利用当前模型参数θ产生的策略、价值和奖励估计。MCTS算法输出推荐策略π_t和估计价值ν_t。然后选择动作a_{t+1} ∼ π_t。

items.en: All parameters of the model are trained jointly to accurately match the policy, value, and reward, for every hypothetical step k𝑘k, to corresponding target values observed after k𝑘k actual time-steps have elapsed. Similarly to AlphaZero, the improved policy targets are generated by an MCTS search; the first objective is to minimise the error between predicted policy 𝐩tksuperscriptsubscript𝐩𝑡𝑘\mathbf{p}_{t}^{k} and search policy πt+ksubscript𝜋𝑡𝑘\pi_{t+k}. Also like AlphaZero, the improved value targets are generated by playing the game or MDP. However, unlike AlphaZero, we allow for long episodes with discounting and intermediate rewards by bootstrapping n𝑛n steps into the future from the search value, zt=ut+1+γ​ut+2+…+γn−1​ut+n+γn​νt+nsubscript𝑧𝑡subscript𝑢𝑡1𝛾subscript𝑢𝑡2…superscript𝛾𝑛1subscript𝑢𝑡𝑛superscript𝛾𝑛subscript𝜈𝑡𝑛z_{t}=u_{t+1}+\gamma u_{t+2}+...+\gamma^{n-1}u_{t+n}+\gamma^{n}\nu_{t+n}. Final outcomes {l​o​s​e,d​r​a​w,w​i​n}𝑙𝑜𝑠𝑒𝑑𝑟𝑎𝑤𝑤𝑖𝑛\{lose,draw,win\} in board games are treated as rewards ut∈{−1,0,+1}subscript𝑢𝑡101u_{t}\in\{-1,0,+1\} occuring at the final step of the episode. Specifically, the second objective is to minimize the error between the predicted value vtksubscriptsuperscript𝑣𝑘𝑡v^{k}_{t} and the value target, zt+ksubscript𝑧𝑡𝑘z_{t+k} 111For chess, Go and shogi, the same squared error loss as AlphaZero is used for rewards and values. A cross-entropy loss was found to be more stable than a squared error when encountering rewards and values of variable scale in Atari. Cross-entropy was used for the policy loss in both cases.. The reward targets are simply the observed rewards; the third objective is therefore to minimize the error between the predicted reward rtksubscriptsuperscript𝑟𝑘𝑡r^{k}_{t} and the observed reward ut+ksubscript𝑢𝑡𝑘u_{t+k}. Finally, an L2 regularization term is also added, leading to the overall loss:
items.zh: 模型的所有参数被联合训练，以在每个假设步骤k准确匹配策略、价值和奖励与经过k个实际时间步后观测到的相应目标值。与AlphaZero类似，改进的策略目标由MCTS搜索生成；第一个目标是最小化预测策略p^k_t与搜索策略π_{t+k}之间的误差。同样与AlphaZero类似，改进的价值目标通过玩游戏或MDP生成。然而，与AlphaZero不同，我们允许通过从搜索价值进行n步自举来处理长回合、折扣和中间奖励：z_t = u_{t+1}+γu_{t+2}+...+γ^{n-1}u_{t+n}+γ^nν_{t+n}。棋盘游戏中的最终结果{lose,draw,win}被视为在回合最后一步发生的奖励u_t ∈ {-1,0,+1}。具体来说，第二个目标是最小化预测价值v^k_t与价值目标z_{t+k}之间的误差。奖励目标就是观测到的奖励；因此第三个目标是最小化预测奖励r^k_t与观测奖励u_{t+k}之间的误差。最后，还添加了L2正则化项，得到总损失：

items.en: where lrsuperscript𝑙𝑟l^{r}, lvsuperscript𝑙𝑣l^{v}, and lpsuperscript𝑙𝑝l^{p} are loss functions for reward, value and policy respectively. Supplementary Figure S2 summarizes the equations governing how the MuZero algorithm plans, acts, and learns.
items.zh: 其中l^r、l^v和l^p分别是奖励、价值和策略的损失函数。补充图S2总结了MuZero算法规划、行动和学习的方程。

items.capEn: Figure 2: Evaluation of MuZero throughout training in chess, shogi, Go and Atari. The x-axis shows millions of training steps. For chess, shogi and Go, the y-axis shows Elo rating, established by playing games against AlphaZero using 800 simulations per move for both players. MuZero’s Elo is indicated by the blue line, AlphaZero’s Elo by the horizontal orange line. For Atari, mean (full line) and median (dashed line) human normalized scores across all 57 games are shown on the y-axis. The scores for R2D2 [21], (the previous state of the art in this domain, based on model-free RL) are indicated by the horizontal orange lines. Performance in Atari was evaluated using 50 simulations every fourth time-step, and then repeating the chosen action four times, as in prior work [25].
items.capZh: 图2：MuZero在国际象棋、将棋、围棋和Atari训练过程中的评估。x轴表示训练步数（百万）。对于国际象棋、将棋和围棋，y轴表示Elo等级，通过让双方每步使用800次模拟与AlphaZero对弈确定。MuZero的Elo用蓝线表示，AlphaZero的Elo用水平橙线表示。对于Atari，y轴显示所有57个游戏的平均（实线）和中位数（虚线）人类归一化分数。R2D2 [21]（该领域先前最优方法，基于无模型RL）的分数用水平橙线表示。Atari性能评估使用每四个时间步50次模拟，然后重复所选动作四次，如先前工作[25]所示。

items.en: We applied the MuZero algorithm to the classic board games Go, chess and shogi 222Imperfect information games such as Poker are not directly addressed by our method., as benchmarks for challenging planning problems, and to all 57 games in the Atari Learning Environment [2], as benchmarks for visually complex RL domains.
items.zh: 我们将MuZero算法应用于经典棋盘游戏围棋、国际象棋和将棋，作为挑战性规划问题的基准，以及Atari学习环境[2]中的所有57个游戏，作为视觉复杂RL领域的基准。

items.en: In each case we trained MuZero for K=5𝐾5K=5 hypothetical steps. Training proceeded for 1 million mini-batches of size 2048 in board games and of size 1024 in Atari. During both training and evaluation, MuZero used 800 simulations for each search in board games, and 50 simulations for each search in Atari. The representation function uses the same convolutional [23] and residual [15] architecture as AlphaZero, but with 16 residual blocks instead of 20. The dynamics function uses the same architecture as the representation function and the prediction function uses the same architecture as AlphaZero. All networks use 256 hidden planes (see Methods for further details).
items.zh: 在每种情况下，我们训练MuZero进行K=5个假设步骤。训练在棋盘游戏中进行了100万个小批量（大小为2048），在Atari中进行了100万个小批量（大小为1024）。在训练和评估期间，MuZero在棋盘游戏中每次搜索使用800次模拟，在Atari中每次搜索使用50次模拟。表示函数使用与AlphaZero相同的卷积[23]和残差[15]架构，但使用16个残差块而不是20个。动态函数使用与表示函数相同的架构，预测函数使用与AlphaZero相同的架构。所有网络使用256个隐藏平面（更多细节见方法）。

items.en: In Atari, MuZero achieved a new state of the art for both mean and median normalized score across the 57 games of the Arcade Learning Environment, outperforming the previous state-of-the-art method R2D2 [21] (a model-free approach) in 42 out of 57 games, and outperforming the previous best model-based approach SimPLe [20] in all games (see Table S1).
items.zh: 在Atari中，MuZero在Arcade学习环境的57个游戏中实现了平均和中位数归一化分数的新最优水平，在57个游戏中的42个中优于先前最优方法R2D2 [21]（一种无模型方法），并在所有游戏中优于先前最佳基于模型方法SimPLe [20]（见表S1）。

items.en: We also evaluated a second version of MuZero that was optimised for greater sample efficiency. Specifically, it reanalyzes old trajectories by re-running the MCTS using the latest network parameters to provide fresh targets (see Appendix H). When applied to 57 Atari games, using 200 million frames of experience per game, MuZero Reanalyze achieved 731% median normalized score, compared to 192%, 231% and 431% for previous state-of-the-art model-free approaches IMPALA [9], Rainbow [17] and LASER [36] respectively.
items.zh: 我们还评估了 MuZero 的第二个版本，该版本针对更高的样本效率进行了优化。具体来说，它通过使用最新的网络参数重新运行 MCTS 来重新分析旧轨迹，以提供新的目标（见附录 H）。当应用于 57 个 Atari 游戏时，每个游戏使用 2 亿帧经验，MuZero Reanalyze 实现了 731% 的中位数归一化得分，而之前最先进的无模型方法 IMPALA [9]、Rainbow [17] 和 LASER [36] 分别为 192%、231% 和 431%。

items.en: To understand the role of the model in MuZero we also ran several experiments, focusing on the board game of Go and the Atari game of Ms. Pacman.
items.zh: 为了理解模型在 MuZero 中的作用，我们还进行了一些实验，重点关注棋盘游戏围棋和 Atari 游戏 Ms. Pacman。

items.en: First, we tested the scalability of planning (Figure 3A), in the canonical planning problem of Go. We compared the performance of search in AlphaZero, using a perfect model, to the performance of search in MuZero, using a learned model. Specifically, the fully trained AlphaZero or MuZero was evaluated by comparing MCTS with different thinking times. MuZero matched the performance of a perfect model, even when doing much larger searches (up to 10s thinking time) than those from which the model was trained (around 0.1s thinking time, see also Figure S3A).
items.zh: 首先，我们在围棋这一经典规划问题中测试了规划的可扩展性（图 3A）。我们比较了使用完美模型的 AlphaZero 中的搜索性能与使用学习模型的 MuZero 中的搜索性能。具体来说，通过比较不同思考时间下的 MCTS 来评估完全训练好的 AlphaZero 或 MuZero。即使进行比训练模型时（约 0.1 秒思考时间，另见图 S3A）大得多的搜索（高达 10 秒思考时间），MuZero 也匹配了完美模型的性能。

items.en: We also investigated the scalability of planning across all Atari games (see Figure 3B). We compared MCTS with different numbers of simulations, using the fully trained MuZero. The improvements due to planning are much less marked than in Go, perhaps because of greater model inaccuracy; performance improved slightly with search time, but plateaued at around 100 simulations. Even with a single simulation – i.e. when selecting moves solely according to the policy network – MuZero performed well, suggesting that, by the end of training, the raw policy has learned to internalise the benefits of search (see also Figure S3B).
items.zh: 我们还研究了所有 Atari 游戏中规划的可扩展性（见图 3B）。我们使用完全训练好的 MuZero，比较了不同模拟次数下的 MCTS。规划带来的改进远不如围棋中显著，可能是因为模型不准确性更大；性能随搜索时间略有提升，但在约 100 次模拟时趋于平稳。即使只有一次模拟——即仅根据策略网络选择动作——MuZero 也表现良好，这表明在训练结束时，原始策略已经内化了搜索的好处（另见图 S3B）。

items.en: Next, we tested our model-based learning algorithm against a comparable model-free learning algorithm (see Figure 3C). We replaced the training objective of MuZero (Equation 1) with a model-free Q-learning objective (as used by R2D2), and the dual value and policy heads with a single head representing the Q-function Q(⋅|st)Q(\cdot|s_{t}). Subsequently, we trained and evaluated the new model without using any search. When evaluated on Ms. Pacman, our model-free algorithm achieved identical results to R2D2, but learned significantly slower than MuZero and converged to a much lower final score. We conjecture that the search-based policy improvement step of MuZero provides a stronger learning signal than the high bias, high variance targets used by Q-learning.
items.zh: 接下来，我们将基于模型的学习算法与可比较的无模型学习算法进行了测试（见图 3C）。我们将 MuZero 的训练目标（公式 1）替换为无模型的 Q-learning 目标（如 R2D2 所用），并将双值头和策略头替换为表示 Q 函数 Q(·|s_t) 的单头。随后，我们在不使用任何搜索的情况下训练和评估了新模型。在 Ms. Pacman 上评估时，我们的无模型算法达到了与 R2D2 相同的结果，但学习速度明显慢于 MuZero，并收敛到更低的最终得分。我们推测，MuZero 基于搜索的策略改进步骤提供了比 Q-learning 使用的高偏差、高方差目标更强的学习信号。

items.en: To better understand the nature of MuZero’s learning algorithm, we measured how MuZero’s training scales with respect to the amount of search it uses during training. Figure 3D shows the performance in Ms. Pacman, using an MCTS of different simulation counts per move throughout training. Surprisingly, and in contrast to previous work [1], even with only 6 simulations per move – fewer than the number of actions – MuZero learned an effective policy and improved rapidly. With more simulations performance jumped significantly higher. For analysis of the policy improvement during each individual iteration, see also Figure S3 C and D.
items.zh: 为了更好地理解 MuZero 学习算法的本质，我们测量了 MuZero 的训练如何随训练期间使用的搜索量而扩展。图 3D 显示了在 Ms. Pacman 中的性能，训练过程中每步使用不同模拟次数的 MCTS。令人惊讶的是，与之前的工作 [1] 相反，即使每步只有 6 次模拟——少于动作数量——MuZero 也学习了有效的策略并迅速改进。随着模拟次数增加，性能显著提升。关于每次迭代中策略改进的分析，另见图 S3 C 和 D。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Evaluations of MuZero on Go (A), all 57 Atari Games (B) and Ms. Pacman (C-D). (A) Scaling with search time per move in Go, comparing the learned model with the ground truth simulator. Both networks were trained at 800 simulations per search, equivalent to 0.1 seconds per search. Remarkably, the learned model is able to scale well to up to two orders of magnitude longer searches than seen during training. (B) Scaling of final human normalized mean score in Atari with the number of simulations per search. The network was trained at 50 simulations per search. Dark line indicates mean score, shaded regions indicate 25th to 75th and 5th to 95th percentiles. The learned model’s performance increases up to 100 simulations per search. Beyond, even when scaling to much longer searches than during training, the learned model’s performance remains stable and only decreases slightly. This contrasts with the much better scaling in Go (A), presumably due to greater model inaccuracy in Atari than Go. (C) Comparison of MCTS based training with Q-learning in the MuZero framework on Ms. Pacman, keeping network size and amount of training constant. The state of the art Q-Learning algorithm R2D2 is shown as a baseline. Our Q-Learning implementation reaches the same final score as R2D2, but improves slower and results in much lower final performance compared to MCTS based training. (D) Different networks trained at different numbers of simulations per move, but all evaluated at 50 simulations per move. Networks trained with more simulations per move improve faster, consistent with ablation (B), where the policy improvement is larger when using more simulations per move. Surprisingly, MuZero can learn effectively even when training with less simulations per move than are enough to cover all 8 possible actions in Ms. Pacman.
items.capZh: 图 3：MuZero 在围棋（A）、所有 57 个 Atari 游戏（B）和 Ms. Pacman（C-D）上的评估。（A）围棋中每步搜索时间与性能的缩放，比较学习模型与真实模拟器。两个网络均在每次搜索 800 次模拟下训练，相当于每次搜索 0.1 秒。值得注意的是，学习模型能够很好地扩展到比训练时长达两个数量级的更长搜索。（B）Atari 游戏中最终人类归一化平均得分随每次搜索模拟次数的缩放。网络在每次搜索 50 次模拟下训练。深色线表示平均得分，阴影区域表示 25% 到 75% 和 5% 到 95% 分位数。学习模型的性能在每次搜索 100 次模拟时增加。之后，即使扩展到比训练时长得多的搜索，学习模型的性能保持稳定，仅略有下降。这与围棋中更好的缩放（A）形成对比，可能是由于 Atari 中模型不准确性比围棋更大。（C）在 MuZero 框架下，基于 MCTS 的训练与 Q-learning 在 Ms. Pacman 上的比较，保持网络大小和训练量不变。最先进的 Q-learning 算法 R2D2 作为基线显示。我们的 Q-learning 实现达到了与 R2D2 相同的最终得分，但改进较慢，并且与基于 MCTS 的训练相比，最终性能低得多。（D）不同网络在不同每步模拟次数下训练，但均在每步 50 次模拟下评估。每步模拟次数更多的网络改进更快，与消融实验（B）一致，其中使用更多模拟次数时策略改进更大。令人惊讶的是，即使训练时的每步模拟次数少于覆盖 Ms. Pacman 中所有 8 个可能动作所需的次数，MuZero 也能有效学习。

items.en: Many of the breakthroughs in artificial intelligence have been based on either high-performance planning [5, 38, 39] or model-free reinforcement learning methods [25, 29, 46]. In this paper we have introduced a method that combines the benefits of both approaches. Our algorithm, MuZero, has both matched the superhuman performance of high-performance planning algorithms in their favored domains – logically complex board games such as chess and Go – and outperformed state-of-the-art model-free RL algorithms in their favored domains – visually complex Atari games. Crucially, our method does not require any knowledge of the game rules or environment dynamics, potentially paving the way towards the application of powerful learning and planning methods to a host of real-world domains for which there exists no perfect simulator.
items.zh: 人工智能的许多突破要么基于高性能规划 [5, 38, 39]，要么基于无模型强化学习方法 [25, 29, 46]。在本文中，我们介绍了一种结合两种方法优点的方法。我们的算法 MuZero 既在它们偏爱的领域——逻辑复杂的棋盘游戏如国际象棋和围棋——中匹配了高性能规划算法的超人类表现，又在它们偏爱的领域——视觉复杂的 Atari 游戏——中超越了最先进的无模型强化学习算法。关键的是，我们的方法不需要任何关于游戏规则或环境动态的知识，这为将强大的学习和规划方法应用于许多不存在完美模拟器的现实世界领域铺平了道路。

items.en: Lorrayne Bennett, Oliver Smith and Chris Apps for organizational assistance; Koray Kavukcuoglu for reviewing the paper; Thomas Anthony, Matthew Lai, Nenad Tomasev, Ulrich Paquet, Sumedh Ghaisas for many fruitful discussions; and the rest of the DeepMind team for their support.
items.zh: 感谢 Lorrayne Bennett、Oliver Smith 和 Chris Apps 的组织协助；Koray Kavukcuoglu 审阅论文；Thomas Anthony、Matthew Lai、Nenad Tomasev、Ulrich Paquet、Sumedh Ghaisas 进行多次富有成果的讨论；以及 DeepMind 团队其他成员的支持。
